verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I think of how He came So far from glory He came to dwell among the lowly such as I To suffer shame and such disgrace On Mount Calvary take my place Then I ask myself this question Who am I?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Who am I that The King Would bleed and die for Who am I that He would pray "Not my will, thine Lord." The answer I'm beginning to know Why He ever loved me so That to that old rugged cross He'd go For who am I.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Well, I'm reminded of His words, "I'll leave you never. If you'll be true I'll give to you life forever." Oh I wonder what I could have done To deserve God's only Son To fight my battles until they're won For who am I.
